description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows (Qt 6, x64) that can be triggered manually. Run a single windows-latest job that checks out the repository, installs Qt 6.2.2 for 64-bit Windows with MinGW, sets up a build environment, configures CMake for a Release build with Qt 6 and tests enabled, builds the project, runs tests, packages the application with windeployqt, and uploads the resulting artifact.
